_comment: Pace modes demo: the whole foot line is box-selected and given an ATTACK order (the click lands exactly on the enemy Infantry's spawn, before the enemy AI's first advance tick moves it) -- an attack move paces on AUTO, so the advance shows all three phases: walk on approach, jog once the enemy archers' fire reaches the line, and the full sprint inside charge distance of the target. A ground click would instead lock the single-click WALK gait and show no pacing at all.
